hits.text: `Quantum L7 AI is a cross-platform ecosystem: the AI core, autonomous L7 agents, on-chain monitoring, normalized market feeds, the forum social network, and the QCoin economy are combined into a single computational fabric. hits.text: `The forum is embedded into the loop: content passes AI scoring (quality, engagement, anti-spam/anti-sybil), and activity is mapped into the QCoin economy. hits.why: Loop особенно опасен на множестве карточек
